title: A Meeting That Changes Shandora
description: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
scene: Across pages 17, this scene focuses on Mont Blanc Noland, Calgara, Musse, Shandia villagers, Nola. Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Noland
dialogue.text: Is nothing more than a disease...!

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Can you really... save my dear village!?

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Can the village... Really be saved!?

summary: Noland and Calgara’s bond grows as the people of Shandora begin to see a path beyond fear and sacrifice.
